problem: Why does acute pain become chronic in some people — what neural change occurs?
mechanism: Microbiome modulation via targeted bacteriophage therapy
hypothesis: The key to Why does acute pain become chronic in some people — what neural change occurs? is Microbiome modulation via targeted bacteriophage therapy — specifically Microbiome modulation via — which would help 50,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: In vitro cell culture assay with 21 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
